# ArtPro Gallery

> ArtPro Gallery is a South African art gallery representing 50+ artists across four galleries in and around Johannesburg. It sells original paintings, decorative art and investment pieces, and offers framing, commissions, valuations, certificates of authenticity and nationwide delivery.

## Key pages
- [Art for Sale](https://artpro-gallery.louisvent.workers.dev/art-for-sale): browse available works by medium (oil, acrylic, watercolour and more)
- [Artists](https://artpro-gallery.louisvent.workers.dev/artists): the represented South African artists
- [Art by Artists](https://artpro-gallery.louisvent.workers.dev/art-by-artists): works grouped by the artist who made them
- [Virtual Gallery](https://artpro-gallery.louisvent.workers.dev/interactive-gallery): an interactive 3D gallery you can explore online
- [Services](https://artpro-gallery.louisvent.workers.dev/services): framing, hanging, commissions, valuations, delivery
- [About](https://artpro-gallery.louisvent.workers.dev/about)
- [Contact](https://artpro-gallery.louisvent.workers.dev/contact): the four gallery locations and enquiries

## Galleries
- Sunninghill Village, Sandton (head office)
- Prison Break Market, Kyalami (art-classes studio)
- ArtPro @ Lifestyle, Randpark Ridge (garden centre)
- Maggies Farm, Lanseria (farm gallery)

## Contact
- Phone: +27 82 555 4272
- Email: lee@artprogallery.co.za
- Delivery: nationwide across South Africa, international shipping available
